arts.ttl: Who is Josh Acheampong? The England under-19 international who could make first Chelsea start in EFL Cup
£50m Chelsea player needs to have the game of his life tomorrow as Enzo Maresca hints at opportunity - opinion
arts.sum: He could start for the Blues.

The France international joined the Blues from RB Leipzig last summer, but he endured an injury-hit debut campaign at Stamford Bridge and was only able to muster 516 minutes of action in all competitions. Christopher Nkunku has reportedly been told that his future at Chelsea isn’t yet secure.

arts.ttl: The warning Chelsea have now issued to Christopher Nkunku
arts.sum: He's going to have to take every opportunity he gets.
